response.justification: While the candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and distributed systems experience, the role critically requires modern C++ or Rust proficiency. The candidate's C++ experience is dated (2014-2015) and minimal, recent work is primarily TypeScript/Node.js, and there is no demonstrated experience with navigation or routing systems—core to this role's mission of building routing data pipelines.
strengths: Strong geospatial platform expertise with 10+ year involvement in GISCollective and mapping applications
Proven large-scale distributed systems experience handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Demonstrated versatility across full technical stack with ability to rapidly learn new domains and technologies
concerns: Limited and outdated C++ experience (2014-2015); no modern C++ work; recent 5+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js
No Rust experience mentioned; no substitute for weak C++ given Rust listed as acceptable alternative
No navigation or routing system experience; geospatial background is GIS-focused, not routing-specific
